narrative:
Danbury 1 (Marblehead) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 782 registered voters, with 44.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.3 percentage points.
